text:
A pilot is not liable directly or as a member of an organization of pilots for any claim that:

(1) arises from an act or omission of another pilot or organization of pilots; and

(2) relates directly or indirectly to pilot services.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.082 — Pilot Liability

A pilot is not liable directly or as a member of an organization of pilots for any claim that:

    (1) arises from an act or omission of another pilot or organization of pilots; and

    (2) relates directly or indirectly to pilot services.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A pilot is not liable directly or as a member of an organization of pilots for any claim that:
arises from an act or omission of another pilot or organization of pilots; and
relates directly or indirectly to pilot services.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
